docs:
Add to the `html_helpers` function in your `my_app_web.ex`:

    import MyAppWeb.Components.UI.Item

Replace `MyAppWeb` with your application's module prefix.

files.content:
defmodule MyAppWeb.Components.UI.Item do use Phoenix.Component attr :class, :string, default: nil attr :rest, :global slot :media slot :content, required: true slot :action def item(assigns) do ~H"""
{render_slot(@media)}
{render_slot(@content)}
{render_slot(@action)}
""" end end

name: item
title: Item
